title: Unobtainable Blocks
description: Adds items for normally unobtainable blocks, like nether portals and fire.
body:
# UnobtainableBlocks
*Adds items for...unobtainable blocks.*

![blocks.png](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/telecter/UnobtainableBlocks/refs/heads/master/blocks.png)

## Items Added
* Nether Portal
* End Portal
* End Gateway
* Fire
* Soul Fire
* Water
* Lava

This mod also adds some existing items to the Creative menu that are only obtainable with commands:
* Petrified Oak Slab
